technologyDescription: OOD detection framework for anomaly detection
task: Analyze validation test data and identify anomalies
capability: Detect input data outside training distribution
idea: Integrate into validation pipeline to flag anomalous production data
fitRationale: Improves root cause analysis and reduces debugging time

technologyDescription: Adds small trainable modules to adapt a frozen backbone
task: Set up mechanical, hydraulic, or electric test equipment
capability: Inject trainable parameters into frozen model architectures
idea: Use adapters to customize a vision-language model for failure pattern recognition
fitRationale: Useful for adapting models to BMW-specific test environments

technologyName: Full Factory Digital Twin Coverage (NVIDIA Omniverse)
technologyDescription: A full-factory digital twin built with NVIDIA Omniverse to simulate production flows, validate layouts, test process changes, and identify bottlenecks before physical implementation.
task: Plan, validate, and optimize factory layouts, production processes, throughput, and root-cause analysis for manufacturing operations.
capability: Simulate full-factory operations and evaluate process changes virtually before deployment
idea: Manufacturing systems engineers can use NVIDIA Omniverse to create full digital twin coverage of a BMW factory for analysis.
fitRationale: A full-factory digital twin directly supports manufacturing optimization, reduces physical trial-and-error, improves throughput planning, and helps validate changes before costly implementation.
